title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 191.731 - Pregnant woman referred for substance abuse to have priority for treatment — confidentiality of records
text:
191.731.  Pregnant woman referred for substance abuse to have priority for treatment — confidentiality of records. — A pregnant woman referred for substance abuse treatment shall be a first-priority user of available treatment.  All records and reports regarding such pregnant woman shall be kept confidential.  The division of alcohol and drug abuse shall ensure that family-oriented substance abuse treatment be available, as appropriations allow.  Substance abuse treatment facilities which receive public funds shall not refuse to treat women solely because they are pregnant.
(L. 1991 S.B. 190 § 4) 
Effective 7-1-92
